project: Drama Gold Portuguese worker drama watch-and-earn ads
product_category: watch drama / task rewards / online earning style app
goal: Generate 9 Portuguese 30-second vertical ads: three independent scripts, each with three variants. Style: live-action spokesperson + melodramatic short-drama conflict + watch-and-earn structure for Brazilian workers.

format.segment_strategy: two 15-second Seedance segments per final; different characters in first and second 15 seconds

audio_policy.sfx: workplace/bus/street ambience, phone taps, reward chimes, Pix/Nubank notification, coins/cash sounds

earning_rules: User did not provide fixed earning amounts or guaranteed payout rules. Ads may show balance growth, task rewards, Pix or Nubank withdrawal screens, and Brazilian real cash visuals, but must not promise guaranteed income, exact fixed payouts, or guaranteed instant payment.
hard_constraints: No subtitles or burned captions; spoken Portuguese voiceover must be native in the generated video.
Payment/withdrawal method shown must be Pix or Nubank only.
Brazilian money visuals must resemble the provided BR reais reference image; avoid foreign currency styles.
Each 30-second final uses different character/voice in first 15 seconds and second 15 seconds to avoid same-person voice mismatch.
Use Drama Gold icon accurately in phone UI/end card.
No exact guaranteed earning amount unless shown as fictional app balance with conditions; no guarantee wording.
